metadata.name: New Module
metadata.author: Unknown
metadata.description: An invasion threatens the realm. Forge powerful weapons from artifacts hidden in treacherous dungeons and deliver them to the armory in Ironmarch.

towns.name: Ironmarch
towns.description: A crossroads town where adventurers gather to share rumours and ale.

key_dungeons.name: Crimson Vaults
key_dungeons.description: Bones litter the threshold of Crimson Vaults. Whatever guards this place does not welcome visitors.
key_dungeons.quest_objective: Slay the guardian of Crimson Vaults and claim the Onyx Key
key_dungeons.quest_hint: A fearsome creature guards the prize.
